title: Heckington Fen Solar Park: correction of errors, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State to make corrections to the Heckington Fen Solar Park Order 2025.  Date of decision  11 April 2025  Company/location   Ecotricity (Heck Fen Solar) LimitedLincolnshire   Type of project  Development consent order for a photovoltaic solar farm / Correction of errors, Planning Act 2008 "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
